summary: Completed comprehensive testing of Multi-Agent Discussion and Pipeline modes. All multi-agent features working correctly. Backend APIs for discussion/pipeline session creation and multi-agent SSE streaming are fully functional. Frontend UI properly displays mode selector, agent checkboxes, multi-agent info bars with badges, and sequential streaming responses. Session list correctly shows DIS/PIP badges. Keyboard shortcuts work as expected.

notes: Two test failures are NOT bugs - they're due to test using gpt-4o which isn't supported by the current Emergent LLM key. The key only supports Claude models.

integration_issues.issue: Default model for new sessions is gpt-5.2, which is not supported by current Emergent LLM key. This causes authentication errors when users create single-agent sessions via Ctrl+N, new tab button, or new session button.
affected_code: ChatArea.js line 124: new tab button uses 'gpt-5.2'
Sidebar.js line 27: newSessionModel state defaults to 'gpt-5.2'
integration_issues.recommended_fix: Change default model from 'gpt-5.2' to 'claude-sonnet-4.5' in all three locations

passed_tests: Backend: POST /api/sessions with mode=discussion creates multi-agent session
Backend: POST /api/sessions with mode=pipeline creates multi-agent session
Backend: POST /api/chat/multi-stream returns SSE with agent_start, chunk, agent_done events
Backend: Session creation validates mode and agents correctly
Frontend: Multi-Agent Session button opens NewSessionDialog
Frontend: Mode selector shows Discussion and Pipeline options
Frontend: Agent checkboxes allow selection of multiple models
Frontend: Creating discussion session opens tab with 'Discussion' label and agent badges
Frontend: Creating pipeline session opens tab with 'Pipeline' label and agent badges
Frontend: Multi-agent info bar displays all selected agents with arrow indicators
Frontend: Sending message in multi-agent session streams responses from each agent sequentially
Frontend: Agent responses show model badges and step numbers
Frontend: Session list displays DIS badge for discussion sessions
Frontend: Session list displays PIP badge for pipeline sessions
Frontend: Single-agent session creation still works
Frontend: Keyboard shortcut Ctrl+N creates new session
Frontend: Keyboard shortcut Ctrl+W closes active tab
Backend: Health check endpoint working
Backend: Models list endpoint returns all 5 models
Backend: Project CRUD operations working
Backend: Session CRUD operations working
Backend: Message retrieval working
Backend: Intelligence extraction working

success_percentage.backend: 86% (12/14 tests passed - 2 failures are expected due to model key restrictions)

action_item_for_main_agent: Change default model from 'gpt-5.2' to 'claude-sonnet-4.5' in three locations: Workspace.js (line 401), ChatArea.js (line 124), and Sidebar.js (line 27). This will prevent authentication errors when users create single-agent sessions, since the current Emergent LLM key only supports Claude models.
